fields.summary: Rest API to expose YARN CLASSPATH and other useful system properties

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
Currently to build AM request, the application client need to know about the YARN CLASSPATH. Application client has no way to fetch the default CLASSPATH of YARN or yarn.application.classpath property in yarn-site.xml through REST API.

Introduce a new REST API to fetch yarn CLASSPATH and other system properties that may be useful for those who implement REST client.

resolution.description: The problem is a duplicate of an existing issue.
resolution.name: Duplicate

fields.summary: Add a way for YARN clients to get critical YARN system properties from the RM

status.description: A patch for this issue has been uploaded to JIRA by a contributor.
status.name: Patch Available

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.summary: Problems with CLASSPATH in Job Submission REST API

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

comments.body: This patch introduces a new REST API to fetch yarn system properties. Currently only CLASSPATH is returned through this API but can be extended in future to return other YARN system properties that may be useful for REST clients.

This message was automatically generated.

New REST API introduced in this patch will return the default classpath if 'yarn.application.classpath'  is not configured.
Does <rm-host>:8088/conf do the same ?. From one of the comments in issue YARN-2625, it doesn't return default classpath.

New REST API introduced in this patch will return the default classpath if 'yarn.application.classpath'  is not configured.
Does <rm-host>:8088/conf do the same ?. From one of the comments in issue YARN-2625, it doesn't return default classpath.

Resolved check style issues due to line length. YarnConfiguration.java file already was over 2000 lines before this patch. Hence I have kept it like that.

Even though there is one findbugs warning shown in the report, the ‘FindBugs Report’ page  doesn’t list any warnings. 

Attached latest patch.
